---
title: "Literature Review"
phase: thesis
audience: public
status: current
owner: jan
format: html
---

# Literature Review

This section contains detailed reviews of key papers and methods related to Next-Best-View planning, active perception, egocentric foundation models, radiance-field view selection, and rollout planning.

## Key Papers

### Next-Best-View Planning

- **[VIN-NBV](vin_nbv.qmd)**: Learning-based RRI prediction for quality-driven view planning. Source: [arXiv 2505.06219](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.06219) [@VIN-NBV-frahm2025].
- **[GenNBV](gen_nbv.qmd)**: Continuous 5-DoF policy learning for active 3D reconstruction. Source: [arXiv 2402.16174](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.16174) [@GenNBV-chen2024].
- **[Hestia](hestia.qmd)**: Face-aware hierarchical continuous NBV with look-at-point decomposition. Source: [project page](https://johnnylu305.github.io/hestia_web) [@Hestia-lu2026].
- **[PB-NBV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.10663)**: Projection-based candidate evaluation for efficient unknown-object reconstruction [@PB-NBV-jia2025].
- **[Receding-horizon NBV](https://doi.org/10.1109/ICRA.2016.7487281)** and **[shadowcasting NBV](https://doi.org/10.1109/LRA.2022.3146586)**: search-depth and efficient gain-estimation references for bounded planning [@RecedingHorizonNBV-bircher2016; @ShadowcastingNBV-batinovic2022].
- **[RL and Rollout Planning](rl_planning.qmd)**: Sequence decoding, stochastic beams, offline RL, and value-learning gates.
- **[Active 3DGS and Targeted NBV](active_3dgs_nbv.qmd)**: Fisher-information, object-centric, dynamic, and task-aware 3DGS view selection.

### Foundational Active Perception and View Planning

- **[Active perception](https://doi.org/10.1109/5.5968)** and **[active vision](https://doi.org/10.1007/BF00133571)**: classical framing for perception as action-conditioned sensing [@ActivePerception-bajcsy1988; @ActiveVision-aloimonos1988].
- **[View planning survey](https://doi.org/10.1145/641865.641868)** and **[autonomous 3D NBV system](https://doi.org/10.1109/3468.867866)**: classical generate-and-test NBV baselines and constraints [@ViewPlanningSurvey-scott2003; @NBVSystem-banta2000].

### Foundation Models & Scene Understanding  

- **[EFM3D/EVL](efm3d.qmd)**: Egocentric foundation models for 3D perception and voxel lifting. Source: [arXiv 2406.10224](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.10224) [@EFM3D-straub2024].
- **[SceneScript](scene_script.qmd)**: Structured scene language for semantic scene manipulation. Source: [arXiv 2403.13064](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.13064) [@SceneScript-avetisyan2024].

### Radiance-Field and Gaussian-Splatting View Selection

- **[NeRF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.08934)** and **[3D Gaussian Splatting](https://doi.org/10.1145/3592433)**: representation foundations for active radiance-field and 3DGS view-selection work [@NeRF-mildenhall2020; @GaussianSplatting-kerbl2023].
- **[ActiveNeRF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.08546)** and **[FisherRF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.17874)**: uncertainty and Fisher-information references for active neural/radiance-field selection [@ActiveNeRF-pan2022; @FisherRF-jiang2024].
- **[Next Best Sense](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.04680)**, **[Semantic and Dynamic 3DGS NBV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.22771)**, and **[Object-centric 3DGS NBV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.08266)**: task-aware, dynamic, and object-centric view-selection references [@NextBestSense-strong2024; @li2025bestviewselectionssemantic; @ObjectCentricNBV-jeong2026].

## Local \LaTeX{} Corpus

The local source mirrors that are currently tracked live under `literature/tex-src/`.
Key entry points:

- [`arXiv-EFM3D/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-EFM3D/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-GenNBV/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-GenNBV/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-VIN-NBV/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-VIN-NBV/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-Hestia/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-Hestia/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-Dynamic-3DGS/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-Dynamic-3DGS/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-Instance-NBV/root.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-Instance-NBV/root.tex)
- [`arXiv-project-aria/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-project-aria/main.tex)
- [`arXiv-scene-script/main.tex`](../../literature/tex-src/arXiv-scene-script/main.tex)

Each directory contains the canonical figures (`figures/`), tables, and supplemental PDFs required to reproduce results or cite specific numbers in our documentation.

## Research Context

These literature reviews form the theoretical foundation for integrating pre-trained egocentric models with quality-driven NBV planning. The combination of VIN-NBV's RRI optimization with EFM3D's foundation model capabilities enables better generalization to complex indoor environments compared to traditional coverage-based approaches.

## Navigation

Return to [main documentation](../../index.qmd) or explore specific [metrics and evaluation](../theory/surface_metrics.qmd) approaches.
